global_description: A small, slender songbird with a streamlined body. It features vibrant blue-gray wings and a bright yellow body. The bird has a sharp, pointed beak and a distinctive black eye line. Its plumage is smooth and glossy.

part_details.eye_line: Black, thin line running through the eye.
part_details.tail: Short, blue-gray with a slightly forked shape.

spatial_relations: The blue-gray wings extend from the sides of the yellow body.
The black eye line runs horizontally across the face.
The sharp beak is positioned at the front of the head.
